decks.notes: This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while putting pressure on them with efficient creatures and removal spells. By utilizing cards like Thoughtseize, Force of Will, and Daze to disrupt the opponent's plays, while also utilizing efficient threats like Murktide Regent and Brazen Borrower, the deck aims to control the pace of the game and come out ahead in the tempo war. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and selection while Orcish Bowmasters and Baleful Strix help maintain board presence. Overall, this deck aims to be proactive and adaptable in order to outmaneuver its opponent.

The deck revolves around assembling a quick and explosive combo using a combination of creatures and spells to win the game in one big turn. By utilizing cards like Lotus Petal, Simian Spirit Guide, and Dark Ritual to generate mana, the deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with key combo pieces like Thassa's Oracle and Balustrade Spy. Once the combo is set up, the deck can use its various spells like Reanimate and Memory's Journey to secure the win condition. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful combo before they have a chance to react.

The deck focuses on quickly developing a strong board presence through aggressive mana ramping and efficient creature deployment, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with strategic land destruction and removal spells. The inclusion of versatile tutor cards allows for consistent access to key cards like Dark Depths and Knight of the Reliquary, enabling powerful synergy and combo potential. Additionally, the deck maintains a solid defensive backbone with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Sylvan Safekeeper, ensuring the aggro strategy remains consistently threatening and difficult for opponents to counter effectively.

The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Cabal Therapy, Collective Brutality, and Unmask to disrupt opponent's strategies while quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Archon of Cruelty. Through cards like Shallow Grave and Animate Dead, the deck aims to reanimate these creatures from the graveyard for a game-winning combo. The deck also includes cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to generate additional mana for explosive plays. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful reanimated creatures and disrupt their plans with hand disruption spells.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively utilize artifacts in conjunction with blue spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By playing cards like Urza's Saga, Mox Opal, and Emry, Lurker of the Loch, the deck aims to generate advantage and tempo on the battlefield. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Force of Will and Pithing Needle helps the deck to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining its own aggressive game plan. The deck also includes efficient creatures like Kappa Cannoneer and Patchwork Automaton to apply pressure and close out games swiftly.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with efficient creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing cards like Wasteland, Thoughtseize, and Force of Will, the deck aims to control the game and prevent the opponent from executing their strategy. The inclusion of cards like Murktide Regent and Brazen Borrower allows for quick, evasive threats to close out the game. Overall, the deck aims to tempo out the opponent and maintain control of the board through efficient spells and creatures.

The main focus of this deck is to cheat powerful creatures or spells onto the battlefield quickly by utilizing cards like Show and Tell and Omniscience. By using these key cards, the deck can rapidly assemble game-winning combos, such as putting Emrakul, the Aeons Torn into play without paying its mana cost. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect its game plan and control the opponent's plays. This combo-oriented strategy aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory by leveraging big, game-changing plays.

The deck aims to quickly and efficiently play as many cards as possible from their deck in order to win the game using a powerful combo. By utilizing cards like Lotus Petal, Dark Ritual, and Simian Spirit Guide, the player can cast multiple spells in a single turn leading to a potential game-winning sequence with cards like Balustrade Spy and Thassa's Oracle. The deck also includes protection spells like Pact of Negation and disruption cards like Cabal Therapy to help ensure their combo goes off successfully.

The main focus of this deck is to control the board through disruptive creature removal like Swords to Plowshares and Skyclave Apparition, while also utilizing powerful creatures like Recruiter of the Guard and Stoneforge Mystic to pressure the opponent. The deck also aims to constantly generate value through cards like Yorion, Sky Nomad and Aether Vial, while also utilizing disruptive lands like Wasteland and Karakas. Additionally, the deck includes cards that provide card advantage and utility, such as Thoughtseize and White Orchid Phantom. Overall, the deck seeks to maintain a proactive game plan while disrupting the opponent's strategy.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deploy powerful Eldrazi creatures and disrupt the opponent's strategy with cards like Chalice of the Void and Wasteland. By utilizing mana acceleration from cards like Ancient Tomb and Lotus Petal, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient beatdown creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Reality Smasher. Additionally, the deck includes some control elements like Kozilek's Command and Devourer of Destiny to maintain board dominance. Overall, the strategy is to apply pressure early and maintain a strong board presence throughout the game.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through counter spells, removal, and card advantage. It utilizes blue-based control elements like Force of Will, Brainstorm, and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, it includes green and white cards such as Uro, Titan of Nature's Wrath, Swords to Plowshares, and Leyline Binding for additional removal and value. The deck aims to control the board, outvalue the opponent, and ultimately win the game through card advantage and efficient threats.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a focus on blue and white cards, as well as some red for additional removal and threats, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent while keeping their own gameplan intact. By managing the board with efficient removal like Swords to Plowshares and Prismatic Ending, countering threats with Force of Will and Force of Negation, and drawing cards with Tamiyo and Brainstorm, the deck seeks to stay ahead in resources and ultimately win through incremental advantage.

Utilize various card selection tools and mana acceleration to set up a powerful Doomsday combo, allowing for a quick and decisive victory by assembling the right cards in hand and manipulating the top of the library to win the game with Thassa's Oracle or Orcish Bowmasters. The deck focuses on efficiency and speed, aiming to disrupt opponents with counterspells and hand disruption while maintaining the ability to quickly assemble the combo pieces needed for a game-winning play.

The deck revolves around fast mana sources like Ancient Tomb to power out big threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn through the card Show and Tell. By utilizing cards like Omniscience, the deck can cheat powerful creatures into play without having to pay their mana costs. Additionally, the deck has a strong control element with cards like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares to protect the combo pieces. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively play out powerful Eldrazi creatures by utilizing fast mana sources like Eldrazi Temple and Lotus Petal. Chalice of the Void is used to disrupt opponent's strategy, while Cavern of Souls ensures our Eldrazi spells cannot be countered. The deck also includes powerful threats like Thought-Knot Seer and Reality Smasher to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Wasteland and Wastescape Battlemage provide additional disruption, while Eye of Ugin helps search for key Eldrazi cards. Overall, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain board control to secure a quick victory.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of lands and spells. It uses cards like Thespian's Stage, Dark Depths, and Crop Rotation to generate powerful threats, while also disrupting the opponent with cards like Sphere of Resistance and Wasteland. The deck aims to lock down the opponent's resources with lands like Maze of Ith and Ghost Quarter, while using Life from the Loam to generate card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to establish a dominant board presence while slowing down the opponent's game plan.
